title: Rysons Lens Wipes for Glasses & Spectacles 30 Pack, Individually Sealed
features: Convenient cleaning: These individually sealed moist lens wipes are ideal for quick and easy cleaning of glasses and lenses anytime, anywhere.
Smudge-free vision: Powerful yet gentle formula effortlessly wipes away dust, fingerprints, smudges and more for clear vision.
Wipe and go: No need for water or other solutions, just pull out a fresh wipe and clean lenses on the go in seconds.
Staying fresh: Each wipe is individually sealed to keep cleaning surfaces moist until use for optimal cleaning power.
Pack of 30 wipes: Large quantity of wipes included ensures you'll have plenty on hand for all your lens cleaning needs.
description: These Lens & Spectacles Wipes 30pk by Rysons are a convenient way to keep your glasses and lenses clean on the go. Containing 30 individually sealed moist wipes, this pack provides enough supplies to clean your glasses whenever needed, whether at home or while out and about. The wipes are ideal for wiping away fingerprints, dust, smudges or any other debris that can cause vision issues or annoyances. Simply pull out one fresh wipe at a time and gently wipe your lenses clean, without using water or other liquids. The moist texture of the wipes easily lifts away dirt and grease for clear, streak-free results. Small and portable enough to fit in your bag or pocket, these lens wipes are a must-have for anyone who wears glasses regularly and wants an effortless way to see clearly at all times.
